name: presupuesto-personal
description: App de presupuesto personal con cifrado E2E y sincronización en la nube

scripts.cap:sync:android: node build-web.js && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:sync:ios: node build-web.js && npx cap sync ios
scripts.cap:android: node build-web.js && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:ios: node build-web.js && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.installer:windows: node build-web.js && cd electron && npm run build && npx electron-builder build --win nsis --x64 -c ./electron-builder.config.json
scripts.installer:mac: node build-web.js && cd electron && npm run build && npx electron-builder build --mac dmg -c ./electron-builder.config.json
